spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)' and related imports.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/domain/.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/main/java/jpa/repo/Cl.general_idea: Migrated JPA imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 4.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner and annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support modern testing standards.
Update deprecated PageRequest constructor to the static factory method required by newer Spring Data versions.
Replace deprecated Sort constructor usage with the fluent Sort.by API introduced in newer Spring Data versions.
Switch from JUnit 4 static import to JUnit 5/hamcrest MatcherAssert for assertion compatibility.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat; -> import static org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat;

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Data Neo4j OGM annotations with the new Spring Data Neo4j 6+ schema annotations.
Switch from OGM's @GraphId to the new @Id and @GeneratedValue annotations for identity management.
Standardize the relationship type string to uppercase to align with Neo4j conventions.
Remove the @Index annotation as indexing is now typically handled via schema definitions or repository methods in the new driver.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation to clean up code.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line definitions for brevity.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replaced deprecated GraphRepository with Neo4jRepository to align with Spring Data Neo4j 6+ API.
Updated import for @Query annotation to the new package location in Spring Data Neo4j 6+.
Rewrote Cypher query from legacy START/MATCH syntax to modern pattern matching syntax.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Update Spring Test context configuration to use JUnit 5 extension instead of JUnit 4 runner.
Replace deprecated Neo4j OGM template API with the new Neo4jClient API introduced in recent Spring Data Neo4j versions.
Adapt repository method calls to return Optional as required by modern Spring Data interfaces.
Update assertion calls to use the message-as-last-argument style preferred by JUnit 5.
Remove obsolete comments, debug output, and unused imports to clean up the test class.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Removed out() method, debug comments, and unused HashMap import

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Migrate from the deprecated Neo4j OGM (Object-Graph Mapping) stack to the modern Bolt driver-based Spring Data Neo4j configuration.
Switch the configuration class inheritance from the legacy OGM base class to the new Bolt-driver compatible base class.
Remove the embedded/in-process Neo4j server bean in favor of connecting to an external Neo4j instance via Bolt.
Eliminate the OGM-specific SessionFactory bean which is no longer used in the Bolt driver architecture.
Remove imports for deprecated OGM classes and add imports for the new Bolt driver classes.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Str.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation.
Adjust argument order in assertions to match JUnit 5 API signature.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static assertion imports with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle and test annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents.
Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 extension annotation for Spring context loading.
Reorder assertEquals arguments to match JUnit 5 convention (expected, actual, message).
Correct the error message string for the full name assertion to reflect the actual field being tested.
Remove trailing whitespace and normalize indentation to standard style.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 4 starter parent to manage dependencies and build configuration for the new framework version.
Define the target Java version as 21 in project properties to align with the migration goal.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source and target levels.
Include the new dedicated MongoDB driver module in the multi-module build structure.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the project parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom parent POM to centralize dependency management.
Renamed the Maven artifact ID from mongoboot to spring-boot-mongo to align with the directory name.
Updated the project name and description for clarity.
Removed the explicit java.version property, likely relying on the parent POM or default compiler settings for Java 21 compatibility.
Added a property to manage the version of the docker-maven-plugin.
Added the Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency to enable production-ready features.
Added a Maven profile to configure the docker-maven-plugin for building Docker images.
